identity.name: SevaSetu
identity.description: A bridge between tradition and technology. Trustworthy, transparent, and deeply Indian yet globally accessible.

primary.description: Deep Slate - Used for primary text, forceful headers, and footer backgrounds. Represents Stability.

secondary.description: Indian Saffron - Used for Primary CTAs (Donate), Highlights, and urgent actions. Represents Sacrifice and Energy.

accent.description: Growth Green - Used for success states, progress bars, and nature-related accents.

background.description: Bone/Warm White - A softer alternative to clinical white. Used for main backgrounds.

buttons.primary: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 font-bold tracking-wide px-8 py-3 rounded-full
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-input hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-secondary transition-colors duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full
buttons.outline: border-2 border-white/30 text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-primary transition-all duration-300 font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full

cards.campaign: bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-border/40 hover:border-secondary/30 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl group
cards.stat: bg-slate-50 p-8 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 text-center hover:bg-white hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-secondary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

hero_main.alt: Rural Indian children studying with smiles

health_camp.alt: Doctor examining patient at rural camp

women_empowerment.alt: Indian women self help group meeting

environment.alt: Lush green tea plantation and nature

landing_page.hero: Full viewport height (min-h-[90vh]) with parallax background image and dark gradient overlay. Centered or Left-aligned typography.
landing_page.stats_section: Bento Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4) displaying impact numbers with icons.
landing_page.campaigns: Carousel or Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3) of Campaign Cards.
landing_page.cta_section: High contrast section (Primary Blue bg) with Saffron button.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (left) + Top Header (user profile) + Main Content Area (gray background).
dashboard.widgets: White cards with subtle borders and shadows.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text.
Do NOT use default shadcn card styles without customizing borders and shadows.
Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Use 'Merriweather' ONLY for Headings (h1, h2, h3). Use 'Inter' for everything else.
All buttons must have a hover state transformation (scale or color shift).
Images must have 'object-cover' and rounded corners consistent with the design system.
